facebook.caption:
747 reviews. 4.7 stars. And somehow Tween's Kitchen - Main Street Branch still has tables at dinner.

This is the Vietnamese restaurant locals on Trần Hưng Đạo keep coming back to. Real pho. Real portions. Real prices in the $15-30 range per person.

Not resort food. Not tourist-menu pricing. Just solid Vietnamese cooking on the main strip.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the bowls land on this table. Tween's Kitchen on Trần Hưng Đạo. 747 reviews and every one of them makes sense after the first bite. $15-30 a head. Book it.
